calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-03-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman for and with Meridith Lee. John Alkazin for and with Mary Meredith Ryan (Objector).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to splitting the statutory fees, provided an overview of the work performed and the number of hours spent. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
